untranslatable_reason: The signal requires comparison to close price from exactly 250 trading days ago (12-month lookback). The ALLOWED INDICATORS list only provides prev_close (1 bar back) and sma_200 (approximation). Historical price at arbitrary past offsets (250 bars back) is not in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, the daily rebalancing logic with 1/25th capital allocation per day requires position-sizing rules and sequential entry logic that cannot be expressed in the current condition schema.
translation_notes: This is a time-series momentum strategy requiring: (1) historical price reference at 250-day offset; (2) dynamic daily position sizing (1/25 of capital daily over 25 days); (3) context-dependent direction with simultaneous long/short tracking. The condition schema supports static entry/exit rules but not parameterized historical lookbacks or position-sizing allocation schedules. Recommend implementing as custom backtest logic rather than rule-based conditions.
